commit_scope: Make Coherence Sense connect to the nearby Mac witness automatically through a local Hati witness discovery lane, keeping manual URL entry only as a fallback.

local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed in dirty continuation mode with no blocking risks. Wellness passed with no attention required. Python compile passed with no output. Android Gradle debug build passed; Kotlin reported deprecation warnings for NsdManager.resolveService and NsdServiceInfo.host only. Public-handshake harness passed with APK sha256 99f975a8cc2363d05da8faa1ca56b9d67d9c430f466e11e40872b37fa9fe015e, local Mac witness frames=1, present=true, organs=accel/gyro/light/mag, local Hati mesh organs_count=2, channels_count=1, android announce receipt rt_1ea98d990353, android heartbeat receipt rt_1ccae8c63998, mac witness discovery service_type=_hati-witness._tcp, mode=witness, port=49746, sense_path=/sense, state_path=/state, url=http://192.168.0.7:49746. Generated native assets also passed: macOS arm64 tarball sha256 0dc063ae5b2a6435d5e7acea443a71d8c6928ddb027a031cb29265bc5d678090, Android arm64 tarball sha256 65d072498440b1aba2a7da3f070a59b707d5a41f605f9906102b38a79c6f8864.

deploy_validation.summary: This slice was proven locally. Public release upload/deploy was not run in this turn.

phase_gate.gate: Android discovers the Mac witness as a local Hati service, can start sharing without typed host configuration, and proof asserts the witness discovery descriptor alongside the physical /sense and mesh handshake receipts.
phase_gate.next: Install the rebuilt APK on the Android device and visually confirm same-WiFi auto-fill/start against the running Mac witness, then publish updated assets when release scope is confirmed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The app no longer requires typing the Mac IP to connect. The Mac advertises a local Hati witness service, Android listens for it, fills the witness lane automatically, waits if Start sharing is tapped before discovery resolves, and keeps manual URL entry behind Settings as a fallback.
test_flows: Run the Mac witness server and prove /.well-known/hati-witness returns service name, service type, mode, port, sense path, state path, and fallback URLs.
Build the Android debug APK with NSD discovery and multicast permission support.

Run the local public-handshake harness to prove Android APK build, Hati native public asset build, Mac witness /sense and /state receipts, local Hati mesh announce/heartbeat/list, and Android-to-Mac channel offer.
Assert the Mac witness discovery descriptor in the same proof harness so zero-config discovery is checked with the physical sample lane.
e2e_validation.summary: Local source build and harness proof passed. Device-side visual confirmation is still needed because adb was not available in this worktree session.
